name_corrections.Avalos: Candace Avalos (District 1, Housing & Permitting Committee Chair)
name_corrections.Beery: Jonas Biery (CFO / Deputy City Administrator for Budget & Finance)
name_corrections.Biery: Jonas Biery (CFO / Deputy City Administrator for Budget & Finance)

formatting_preferences: Use markdown headers and bullet points for readability

ATTRIBUTION AUDIT RULE: Every direct quote or paraphrased statement attributed to a specific person MUST include an inline timestamp citation in the format [HH:MM:SS]. This is required so that any attributed comment can be checked against the source YouTube video to verify the transcript correctly identified the speaker. Timestamps enable readers to audit speaker attribution accuracy. This applies throughout all sections of the summary — executive summary, topic flags, key votes, and any other section where a named person is credited with a specific statement, position, or action.

CITY AGENDA LINK: Include a link to the official City of Portland agenda page for this meeting in the summary header. For regular council meetings, the URL format is https://www.portland.gov/council/agenda/YYYY/M/D (using the meeting date with no leading zeros on month/day). For committee meetings and work sessions, use the council calendar at https://www.portland.gov/auditor/council-clerk/meetings to find the correct link. This gives readers access to the official agenda, ordinance text, staff reports, and attachments for each agenda item.
standing_instructions: Do NOT include an Oakleaf Relevance Score section in the summary.
Do NOT include a Public Testimony Highlights section in the summary.
The Housing and Permitting Committee is chaired by Candace Avalos (District 1), NOT Mayor Keith Wilson. Do not state or imply that the Mayor chairs this committee.
The acronym MIRL stands for Moderate Income Revolving Loan (Oregon SB 1567). Never use MURL — the correct acronym is MIRL.
